grid_dimensions_as_printed.note: y_chain_m read top-to-bottom as: 2.00 (roof-eave overhang above row E, not part of the E-A grid chain) / 2.70 (E-D) / 2.30 (D-C) / 3.50 (C-B) / 1.50 (B-A). 2.70+2.30+3.50+1.50=10.00 matches the printed E-A bracket exactly, and matches the grid master's D(2.7)/C(5.0)/B(8.5)/A(10.0) exactly. x_chain_m: 0.60 (left overhang) / 5.00 (grid1-2) / 3.50 (grid2-3) / 0.60 (right overhang), matching the master's grid2(5.0)/grid3(8.5). CONFIRMED against บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_02_หน้า00_gridline.json (structural grid master, built from S-02/S-03) -- no dummy grid (E' etc.) shown on this architecture/sanitary page, consistent with dummy rows being structural-footing-only findings not necessarily drawn on other disciplines' sheets.

elements.description: ถังเก็บน้ำสำเร็จรูปแสตนเลส ขนาดจุ 1 ลบ.ม. มาตรฐาน มอก.989 พร้อมขาตั้งครบชุด วางบนพื้นคอนกรีตเสริมเหล็กหนา 0.10ม. เสริมเหล็ก Ø9มม. @0.20ม., with FLOAT VALVE Ø1/2" at inlet

elements.description: เครื่องสูบน้ำเพิ่มแรงดัน (BOOSTER PUMP, BP) ชนิดอัตโนมัติ ขนาดไม่น้อยกว่า 200 วัตต์ อัตราการสูบน้ำไม่น้อยกว่า 28 ลิตร/นาที ที่ความสูง 12 เมตร ผลิตภัณฑ์ MITSUBISHI, HITACHI, FUJIKA หรือเทียบเท่า
elements.grid_ref: near grid1-2, row E, adjacent to the water storage tank

elements.description: small circle symbol labeled 'ถังบำบัดน้ำเสียสำเร็จรูป' with a leader line, positioned just below/beside the booster pump near the top of the plan, on the Ø4"SW line coming from the tank/pump area
elements.grid_ref: near grid1-2, row E, below the booster pump

elements.description: ถังดักไขมันสำเร็จรูป: ขนาดจุไม่น้อยกว่า 30 ลิตร, ผลิตภัณฑ์ AQUA, PP, DOS, SAN-PAC, HICLEAR หรือเทียบเท่า, การติดตั้งให้เป็นไปตามมาตรฐานผู้ผลิต -- small circle symbol on the Ø2"W line between ครัว and ทานอาหาร

elements.description: ถังบำบัดน้ำเสียสำเร็จรูปชนิดเกรอะ-กรองไร้อากาศ (large hatched/circle symbol at bottom-left, labeled with the same 'ถังบำบัดน้ำเสียสำเร็จรูป' spec text repeated in the notes block): ปริมาตรส่วนเกรอะไม่น้อยกว่า 1.0 ลบ.ม., ปริมาตรส่วนกรอง ไม่น้อยกว่า 0.25 ลบ.ม., ผลิตภัณฑ์ AQUA, PP, DOS, SAN-PAC, HICLEAR หรือเทียบเท่า -- receives the Ø4"SW line running down from ห้องน้ำ 1/เก็บของ

warnings: POSSIBLE DUPLICATE SEPTIC TANK LABEL: this plan appears to show the text/leader 'ถังบำบัดน้ำเสียสำเร็จรูป' pointing to TWO separate circle symbols -- one small circle near the top (just below the booster pump, on the tank/pump-side Ø4"SW line) and one large circle at bottom-left (receiving the ห้องน้ำ 1 stack's Ø4"SW line). This could mean the house has 2 separate septic-tank units (plausible for a 2-story house with fixtures on both the utility/kitchen side and the bathroom side), OR the top instance could be a mislabeled/misread grease-trap-adjacent symbol. Not resolved at this resolution -- flagged as 'septic_tank_or_pretreatment_unit' with reduced confidence for the smaller top instance pending human zoom-review; the bottom-left large tank is transcribed with normal confidence as the main septic_tank.

Room level labels differ from house #3's equivalent ground-floor plan at several positions (ซักล้าง +0.50 here vs +0.20 there; เก็บของ +0.30 here vs +0.60 there; ห้องน้ำ 1 +0.20 here vs +0.50 there) -- transcribed exactly as printed on this house's own drawing, not harmonized to house #3's values; expected to differ since this is a different house design.

Grid (1,2,3 x E,D,C,B,A) confirmed identical to the structural grid master (หน้า00_gridline.json) built from this house's S-02/S-03 sheets -- no dummy grid line (E') is drawn on this sanitary/architecture sheet, consistent with the master's note that the dummy row is a structural-footing-only finding.

Exact routing of individual small-diameter branch CW/W pipes into each room, and the precise count/position of every perimeter X-in-square catch-basin symbol (~8 counted, approximate), is difficult to trace precisely at this resolution -- flagged for zoom-review, consistent with how house #3's equivalent floor-plan page was handled.

Booster pump brand list here reads 'MITSUBISHI, HITACHI, FUJIKA' (matches house #3's spelling) -- note this differs from this same house's own riser-diagram sheet (page52/SN-04), which read 'FUJKCA' at the same position; both transcribed exactly as printed on their respective pages, flagged as an internal print/OCR inconsistency worth a human check rather than corrected to match one or the other.

This ground-floor plan is expected to pair with an upper-floor plan on the next sheet (SN-06, page54) -- see that file's own extraction for any cross-check on the +3.75/+0.60 level-label ambiguity flagged on this house's riser diagram (page52).
